Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanction;
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Martin Eng, Plaintiff appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Martin Eng's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is denied. Plaintiff has not complied with C.R.C. 3.1020 which requires a separate statement for any motion compelling a further response. The separate statement is required to enable the court to understand each request and all the responses that are at issue and so that no person is required to review any other document in order to determine the full request and the full response. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
